records.ety: [F., dim. of manteau, OF. mantel. See Mantle.]

defs: A short cloak formerly worn by knights.
A short cloak or mantle worn by women.
quotes: A mantelet upon his shoulders hanging.

defs: A musket-proof shield of rope, wood, or metal, which is sometimes used for the protection of sappers or riflemen while attacking a fortress, or of gunners at embrasures; -- now commonly written mantlet.
